cmd:
cd /root/hermes-workspace/borg && python - <<'PY2'
import json, subprocess, sys
reqs=[{'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':1,'method':'initialize','params':{}},{'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':2,'method':'tools/list','params':{}},{'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':3,'method':'tools/call','params':{'name':'borg_runtime_fingerprint','arguments':{}}},{'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':4,'method':'tools/call','params':{'name':'borg_observe','arguments':{'task':'continue production readiness review and implementation\n\n=== BORG GUIDANCE ===\nCONFIDENCE: Real traces: 0 | Synthetic: 0 | BORG [SYNTHETIC ONLY]\nPACK GUIDANCE (bash-permission-denied)\n1. Check file permissions: ls -la','context':'operator meta instruction'}}},{'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':5,'method':'tools/call','params':{'name':'borg_observe','arguments':{'task':'Fix bash: ./deploy.sh: Permission denied','context':'bash: ./deploy.sh: Permission denied'}}}]
proc=subprocess.Popen([sys.executable,'-m','borg.integrations.mcp_server'],stdin=subprocess.PIPE,stdout=subprocess.PIPE,stderr=subprocess.PIPE,text=True)
out,err=proc.communicate(''.join(json.dumps(r)+'\n' for r in reqs),timeout=30)
print('FRESH_EXIT=', proc.returncode)
print('FRESH_STDERR_START')
print(err)
print('FRESH_STDERR_END')
print('FRESH_STDOUT_START')
print(out)
print('FRESH_STDOUT_END')
for line in out.splitlines():
    try: obj=json.loads(line)
    except Exception: continue
    if obj.get('id') == 2:
        names=[t.get('name') for t in obj.get('result',{}).get('tools',[])]
        print('HAS_RUNTIME_FINGERPRINT=', 'borg_runtime_fingerprint' in names)
    if obj.get('id') == 3:
        txt=obj.get('result',{}).get('content',[{}])[0].get('text','')
        parsed=json.loads(txt)
        print('FP_SUCCESS=', parsed.get('success'))
        print('FP_CANARY=', parsed.get('confidence_gate_canary',{}).get('passed'))
        print('FP_PATH=', parsed.get('modules',{}).get('borg.integrations.mcp_server',{}).get('path'))
    if obj.get('id') == 4:
        txt=obj.get('result',{}).get('content',[{}])[0].get('text','')
        print('STALE_CANARY_HAS_PACK_GUIDANCE=', 'PACK GUIDANCE' in txt)
        print('STALE_CANARY_HAS_NO_CONFIDENT=', 'NO_CONFIDENT_MATCH' in txt or 'NO CONFIDENT MATCH' in txt)
        print('STALE_CANARY_TEXT_START')
        print(txt[:1200])
        print('STALE_CANARY_TEXT_END')
    if obj.get('id') == 5:
        txt=obj.get('result',{}).get('content',[{}])[0].get('text','')
        print('PERMISSION_POSITIVE_HAS_PERMISSION_PACK=', 'PACK GUIDANCE (bash-permission-denied)' in txt or 'Permission denied' in txt or 'chmod' in txt)
        print('PERMISSION_POSITIVE_TEXT_START')
        print(txt[:1200])
        print('PERMISSION_POSITIVE_TEXT_END')
PY2
